description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist white exterior. The front yard is enclosed by a white picket fence and features a small garden area with greenery, a patio umbrella, and outdoor seating. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and a small step leading up from the garden path. The backyard includes a small shed and additional green space, bordered by dense shrubbery. The upper floor appears to have an open-plan layout with visible furniture and shelving, emphasizing a contemporary urban living style.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced garden featuring outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white exterior wall, a window, the main door, and the fenced garden with greenery and a small shed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical large windows, main entryway, patio umbrella, and the white picket fence enclosing the garden.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a plain white wall, the backyard with a shed, and the garden area bordered by shrubs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large window on the upper floor and the simple, unadorned back wall of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small step, no porch, and minimal decorative elements, set within a fenced garden.
